title: iria insignis
intro: Iria insignis, a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae, is also known as the 'insignis daisy'.  The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects.  The health benefits of Iria insignis include reducing inflammation and improving wound healing, as well as exhibiting potential antiviral and antifungal properties.  The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, allowing for various methods of consumption and application.
